scenes.description: The three VTubers (Oozora Subaru, Hakos Baelz, and Nanashi Mumei) discuss a mystery using a manga-style comic format. No vocal music is playing.
The song '㋰責任集合体' begins. Oozora Subaru, Hakos Baelz, and Nanashi Mumei perform the song. On-screen text indicates 'Lyrics, Music: マサラダ'.
